scripts.prebuild: command -v rsvg-convert && rsvg-convert -w 180 -h 180 public/icon.svg -o public/apple-touch-icon.png && rsvg-convert -w 192 -h 192 public/icon.svg -o public/icon-192.png && rsvg-convert -w 512 -h 512 public/icon.svg -o public/icon-512.png || echo 'rsvg-convert not found, skipping PNG icon generation'
